title: matricaria chamomilla var. recutita
intro: Matricaria chamomilla var. recutita, also known as German chamomile, is a perennial plant with bright yellow flowers and a strong, apple-like fragrance. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe digestive issues, calm anxiety and insomnia, and reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of German chamomile include reducing menstrual cramps, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), as well as promoting relaxation and reducing stress. German chamomile can be consumed as a tea, taken as a supplement, or applied topically as an oil or cream in various herbal preparations, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
